MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Mar-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Tentative decision adopted as the ruling of the court: Defendant INTERSTATE BAKERIES CORPORATION's Motion for Summary Judgment: GRANTED pursuant to Plaintiff's statement of non-opposition. Parties have agreed to dismiss George Matei's cause of action for assault as to all defendants, and Greg Lathrop's cause of action for disability harassment as to all defendants. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
